user_scenarios.user_goal: As an operator, run the Phase 2 demand-development loop with task-contract evaluator support, scenario command evidence, artifact hygiene, cleanup, and the final human merge gate documented as explicit steps.
prerequisites: Existing evaluator harness scripts are available.
No real Codex model call is required for the fake-driver scenario.
user_scenarios.entrypoint: python3 scripts/harness_loop_orchestrator.py preflight --repo-root . --mode demand-development --requirement "Evaluator scenario Phase 2 demand loop" --run-id evaluator-scenario-phase-2 --task-id planner-generator-evaluator-loop-phase-2-01 --confirm && python3 scripts/harness_loop_orchestrator.py run --repo-root . --run-id evaluator-scenario-phase-2 --planner-driver fake --generator-driver fake --evaluator-driver fake --max-eval-attempts 2
steps: Create a confirmed preflight run for the registered Phase 2 task id.
Run the fake Planner and Generator drivers to write planner-output.json and generator-result.json.
Run the fake evaluator driver through the loop entrypoint.
If generator-result.json lists artifacts, run artifact hygiene before cleanup.
Verify the run stops at the human merge gate after evaluator pass and any required hygiene/cleanup.
expected_outcomes: planner-output.json, generator-result.json, and evaluator-result.json exist and validate.
Scenario command output is recorded when task-contract.json includes scenario_commands.
Artifacts listed by generator-result.json are scanned before cleanup.
failure_signals: The loop executes without confirmed preflight.
The loop reports complete instead of waiting for human merge.
Evaluator pass skips artifact_hygiene when generator artifacts are present.
Cleanup runs before artifact hygiene or leaves the run in an active phase.
cleanup: The evaluator may leave .codex/loop-runs/evaluator-scenario-phase-2 as evidence.
